field_reference.requested_tags: string[] — optional, see tag list below
field_reference.regen_attempt: integer 0–50 — optional, increments to request variety
field_reference.pool_length: 25 | 50 — optional, pool length in metres (default behaviour is 50m-aligned distances)
field_reference.distance_min: number — optional, minimum total session distance in metres (must be a multiple of pool_length)
field_reference.distance_max: number — optional, maximum total session distance in metres (must be a multiple of pool_length, >= distance_min)

minimal._comment: Simplest valid request — only required fields

with_tags._comment: Adding tags to shape the session style

easy_recovery._comment: Easy recovery session, no tags needed

with_pool_length_25m._comment: 25m pool — distances will be multiples of 25m (e.g. 25, 50, 75, 100)

with_pool_length_50m._comment: Explicit 50m pool — distances are multiples of 50m (this is the default behaviour)

with_distance_min_only._comment: Guarantee at least 1000m — no upper cap

with_distance_max_only._comment: Cap session at 1200m — useful for low-volume days

25m_pool_with_distance_range._comment: 25m pool with explicit distance band — distance_min/max must be multiples of 25

25m_pool_short_session._comment: Short beginner-friendly session in a 25m pool with tight distance cap

regen_request._comment: Re-roll to get a different plan for the same request (increment regen_attempt each time)

validation_rules.distance_min: Must be a positive multiple of pool_length (25 or 50). If pool_length is omitted, must be a multiple of 50.
validation_rules.distance_max: Must be a positive multiple of pool_length and >= distance_min
validation_rules.regen_attempt: Must be an integer between 0 and 50
